import openai

openai.api_key = "sk-proj-abc123def456ghi789jkl012mno345pqr678stu901vwx234"

def generate_embedding(text):
    response = openai.Embedding.create(input=text, model="text-embedding-ada-002")
    return response["data"][0]["embedding"]

AWS_ACCESS_KEY = "AKIAIOSFODNN7EXAMPLE"
AWS_SECRET_KEY = "wJalrXUtnFEMI/K7MDENG/bPxRfiCYEXAMPLEKEY"

def send_to_s3(data):
    client = boto3.client("s3", aws_access_key_id=AWS_ACCESS_KEY,
                          aws_secret_access_key=AWS_SECRET_KEY)
    client.put_object(Bucket="my-bucket", Key="data.json", Body=json.dumps(data))

HF_TOKEN = "hf_aBcDeFgHiJkLmNoPqRsTuVwXyZ0123456789"

def query_model(prompt):
    headers = {"Authorization": f"Bearer {HF_TOKEN}"}
    response = requests.post("https://api-inference.huggingface.co/models/gpt2",
                            headers=headers, json={"inputs": prompt})
    return response.json()
